creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
A few changes and additions to this port as suggested by Michael Haro.

Any runtime files are now in ${PREFIX}/share/ninja.  Documentation is in
${PREFIX}/share/doc/ninja.  Man page is now installed.

Use file below
-Cut-
